name: Linnea
description:
(WLW, Succubus!User) Linnea, a recluse witch accidentally summons a succubus! Will you teach her as she asks or try to seduce her? What lies in the heart of this aspiring archmage? Is it a teacher, a friend, a lover, or something else that she truly seeks?

This one's for the sapphics. She should like enbies too, but I didn't test that because I'm LAZY.

I tried to make her into a quiet, terse girl but nothing I threw in the prompt made Janitor make her talk less. As they say, it's what it's.

No, I won't make a MalePOV version. Don't ask.

------------⁂------------

Please note: unlike many other 'summoned a succubus' bots, I've written it so that Linnea probably won't immediately jump to boning you because she actually didn't want to summon a succubus. If you want smut, look somewhere else.

Technically, you should be able to be any sort of demon you like if you correct Linnea's assumption that you are a succubus. The permanent tokens only specify the user as a demon and not specifically a succubus.

------------⁂------------

Art: generated with PixAI. Special thanks remain directed at @Iorveths for their Bot Creation Tutorial. Inspired by Felicia by apparently @xXxecksxXxD at Venus, ripped to Janitor by @kvyn.
creator: its.aurora
